heading: Organization
label: 210101 Organization
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)21010136:4701., .May 31, 1920, ch. 216, § 141 Stat. 69136:4702 (words before 2d comma).(words before 2d comma), ; , .May 31, 1920, ch. 216, § 241 Stat. 692May 21, 1953, ch. 63, § 167 Stat. 27This section is substituted for the source provisions for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary and executed words.In subsection (b), the words “Except as otherwise provided” are added, and the word “existence” is substituted for “succession”, for consistency in the revised title.

Change of Name, , provided that:Act May 21, 1953, ch. 63, § 267 Stat. 28“Any law heretofore enacted by the Congress and now in effect which refers to said Roosevelt Memorial Association shall hereafter be deemed to refer to such Association by its new name, Theodore Roosevelt Association.”

Change of Name, , provided that:Act May 21, 1953, ch. 63, § 267 Stat. 28“Any law heretofore enacted by the Congress and now in effect which refers to said Roosevelt Memorial Association shall hereafter be deemed to refer to such Association by its new name, Theodore Roosevelt Association.”

children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: Theodore Roosevelt Association (in this chapter, the “corporation”) is a body corporate and politic in the District of Columbia.

children.heading: .—Perpetual Existence
children.label: b .—Perpetual Existence
children.text: Except as otherwise provided, the corporation has perpetual existence.
